name: Legacy-Equipment-TB4-Kalish-Swiftpack-V1.docx
content:
Does C.E. King support legacy and discontinued machines like the TB4, Kalish, and Swiftpack?

Yes. C.E. King continues to supply spare parts and limited technical support for many legacy machines including the King TB4 (discontinued 2000), Kalish cappers and fillers, and Swiftpack counters.

Details

  • TB4 Tablet Counter: discontinued in 2000, spare parts still supplied via king.parts
  • TB4 machines manufactured before 1995 are pre-CE marking and have no CE certification
  • Kalish Cappers (models 637, 5130, 5210): parts available
  • Kalish Fillit: nozzle parts and some components available
  • Kalish Swiftpack: some parts available
  • Swiftpack SPC models: year of manufacture can be determined from serial number
  • For legacy machines, always provide serial number when requesting parts or information
  • Serial numbers are found on a black and silver plate on the rear of the machine's base cabinet
  • Some legacy machines are 20-30+ years old and still operational — a testament to build quality
  • If a part is no longer available, the team will advise on alternatives where possible

Link: https://www.king.parts
